name: KillDeathSound
author: NoobMCBG
readme_markdown:
KillDeathSound | v3.0.4



鉁旓笍 When the player is killed and dies, the sound will work 鉁旓笍

鉁旓笍 Can be set to work or not 鉁旓笍
鉁旓笍 added sound when hitting or archery hits the enemy 鉁旓笍
鉁旓笍 Can access to KillDeathSound 鉁旓笍
鉁旓笍 Generates blood particles when killed, killed, punched, and hit by archery 鉁旓笍
鉁旓笍 It is possible for all entities to bleed when punching, arching, killing, dying 鉁旓笍
鉁旓笍 Customizable Add Blood Particle to attacker 鉁旓笍

## Update | **Update** | **State**| | --- | --- | | **Can be set to work or not** | **鉁旓笍**| | **added sound when hitting or archery hits the enemy** | **鉁旓笍**| | **Can access to KillDeathSound** | **鉁旓笍**| | **Generates blood particles when killed, killed, punched, and hit by archery** | **鉁旓笍**| | **It is possible for all entities to bleed when punching, arching, killing, dying** | **鉁旓笍**| | **Customizable Add Blood Particle to attacker** | **鉁旓笍**| | **add function addBlood() and addBloodAt() for Developer** | **鉁旓笍**| | **Update config version** | **鉁旓笍**| | **`Update to PocketMine-MP 5.0.0`** | **鉁旓笍** |
## Features >- When the player is killed and dies, the sound will work >- Generates blood particles when killed, killed, punched, and hit by archery >- added sound when hitting or archery hits the enemy

## For Developer >- You can access to KillDeathSound by using ```KillDeathSound::getInstance()``` >- Add sound usage: ```php $player = $event->getPlayer(); $soundName = "random.explode"; $volume = 1; $pitch = 1; KillDeathSound::getInstance()->playSound($player, $soundName, $volume, $pitch); ``` >- Add Blood Particle usage: ```php $position = $event->getPlayer()->getPosition(); KillDeathSound::getInstance()->addBlood($position); // or $x = $event->getPlayer()->getPosition()->getX(); $y = $event->getPlayer()->getPosition()->getY(); $z = $event->getPlayer()->getPosition()->getZ(); $world = $event->getPlayer()->getPosition()->getWorld(); KillDeathSound::getInstance()->addBloodAt($x, $y, $z, $world); ```
## Install >- Step 1: Click the `Direct Download` button to download the plugin >- Step 2: move the file `KillDeathSound.phar` into the file `plugins` >- Step 3: Restart server for plugins to work
